# name: CI / CD

# on:
#   pull_request:
#     branches: [main]
#   push:
#     branches: [main]

# # Cancel redundant runs on the same ref
# concurrency:
#   group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
#   cancel-in-progress: true

# env:
#   NODE_VERSION: "22"
#   PYTHON_VERSION: "3.12"
#   PNPM_VERSION: "9"

# # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# # JOB 1 — Frontend: lint + build  (Next.js + pnpm)
# # Runs on every PR and every push to main
# # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# jobs:
#   frontend-checks:
#     name: "Frontend — Lint & Build"
#     runs-on: ubuntu-latest

#     steps:
#       - uses: actions/checkout@v4

#       - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
#         with:
#           version: ${{ env.PNPM_VERSION }}

#       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
#         with:
#           node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
#           cache: "pnpm"

#       - name: Install dependencies
#         run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

#       - name: Lint
#         run: pnpm lint

#       - name: Build
#         run: pnpm build
#         env:
#           # Fallbacks keep fork PR builds from hard-crashing on missing secrets.
#           # Real values are injected from repo secrets on the upstream repo.
#           NEXT_PUBLIC_FASTAPI_URL: ${{ secrets.NEXT_PUBLIC_FASTAPI_URL || 'http://localhost:8000' }}
#           FASTAPI_URL: ${{ secrets.FASTAPI_URL || 'http://localhost:8000' }}
#           SUPABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_URL || 'https://placeholder.supabase.co' }}
#           SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY || 'placeholder-anon-key' }}
#           SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY || 'placeholder-service-role-key' }}
#           OPENAI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY || 'placeholder-openai-key' }}
#           GEMINI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY || 'placeholder-gemini-key' }}
#           LLM_PROVIDER_PRIORITY: ${{ secrets.LLM_PROVIDER_PRIORITY || 'openai' }}

#   # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#   # JOB 2 — Backend: pytest  (FastAPI / Python 3.12)
#   # Runs on every PR and every push to main
#   # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#   backend-checks:
#     name: "Backend — pytest"
#     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
#     defaults:
#       run:
#         working-directory: backend

#     steps:
#       - uses: actions/checkout@v4

#       - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
#         with:
#           python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
#           cache: "pip"
#           cache-dependency-path: backend/requirements.txt

#       - name: Install dependencies
#         run: pip install -r requirements.txt

#       # generated_tests/ contain Windows absolute paths — skip in Linux CI.
#       - name: Run pytest
#         run: |
#           pytest \
#             --ignore=generated_tests \
#             --cov=. \
#             --cov-report=term-missing \
#             -v
#         env:
#           # Fallbacks allow pytest to run on fork PRs without real Supabase creds.
#           # The app gracefully disables DB writes when these are placeholders.
#           SUPABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_URL || 'https://placeholder.supabase.co' }}
#           SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY || 'placeholder-anon-key' }}
#           SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY || 'placeholder-service-role-key' }}

#   # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#   # JOB 3 — Deploy frontend to Vercel (push to main only)
#   # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#   deploy-frontend:
#     name: "Deploy — Vercel (production)"
#     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
#     needs: [frontend-checks, backend-checks]
#     if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'

#     steps:
#       - uses: actions/checkout@v4

#       - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
#         with:
#           version: ${{ env.PNPM_VERSION }}

#       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
#         with:
#           node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
#           cache: "pnpm"

#       - name: Install Vercel CLI
#         run: pnpm add -g vercel@latest

#       - name: Pull Vercel project settings
#         run: vercel pull --yes --environment=production --token=${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}
#         env:
#           VERCEL_ORG_ID: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_ORG_ID }}
#           VERCEL_PROJECT_ID: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_PROJECT_ID }}

#       - name: Build (Vercel)
#         run: vercel build --prod --token=${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}
#         env:
#           VERCEL_ORG_ID: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_ORG_ID }}
#           VERCEL_PROJECT_ID: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_PROJECT_ID }}

#       - name: Deploy to Vercel
#         run: vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod --token=${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}
#         env:
#           VERCEL_ORG_ID: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_ORG_ID }}
#           VERCEL_PROJECT_ID: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_PROJECT_ID }}

#   # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#   # JOB 4 — Deploy backend to Render (push to main only)
#   # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#   deploy-backend:
#     name: "Deploy — Render (production)"
#     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
#     needs: [frontend-checks, backend-checks]
#     if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'

#     steps:
#       - name: Trigger Render deploy
#         run: |
#           curl --silent --fail --show-error \
#             --request POST \
#             --header "Accept: application/json" \
#             --header "Authorization: Bearer ${{ secrets.RENDER_API_KEY }}" \
#             "https://api.render.com/v1/services/${{ secrets.RENDER_SERVICE_ID }}/deploys" \
#             --data '{}'
